regulations.issue: Improper cooking oil / grease disposal
regulations.recommendation: Use a licensed grease trap and authorized cooking-oil recycling service. Never pour oil down drains.

regulations.issue: Single-use plastic & non-recyclable packaging waste
regulations.recommendation: Switch to biodegradable / compostable packaging. Partner with a packaging waste recycler.

regulations.issue: Refrigerant leaks contributing to ozone depletion
regulations.recommendation: Schedule annual HVAC inspections. Use certified technicians for refrigerant handling.
regulations.regulation_title: Section 608 of the Clean Air Act

regulations.issue: Excessive food waste sent to landfill
regulations.recommendation: Implement composting program and partner with food-rescue organizations to donate surplus.

regulations.issue: Airborne dust and particulate matter from construction activities
regulations.recommendation: Use dust suppression systems, enclose work areas, and monitor PM2.5 / PM10 levels.

regulations.issue: Construction & demolition waste not properly segregated or recycled
regulations.recommendation: Separate concrete, wood, metal, and hazardous materials. Use certified C&D waste recyclers.

regulations.issue: Stormwater runoff contaminating nearby water bodies
regulations.recommendation: Install silt fences, sediment traps, and erosion control blankets on disturbed soil areas.

regulations.issue: Hazardous material (asbestos / lead) exposure during demolition
regulations.recommendation: Conduct pre-demolition hazardous material survey. Use licensed remediation contractors.

regulations.issue: Uncontrolled air emissions exceeding permitted limits
regulations.recommendation: Install scrubbers or filters on emission sources. Conduct quarterly stack emission testing.
regulations.regulation_title: Clean Air Act Title V Operating Permit

regulations.issue: Improper hazardous chemical and waste disposal
regulations.recommendation: Use EPA-licensed hazardous waste disposal contractors. Maintain MSDS records on-site.

regulations.issue: Industrial wastewater discharge without proper treatment
regulations.recommendation: Install on-site wastewater treatment. Apply for NPDES discharge permit before releasing any effluent.

regulations.issue: Overuse of pesticides and herbicides contaminating soil and groundwater
regulations.recommendation: Adopt Integrated Pest Management (IPM). Use buffer zones near water bodies.

regulations.issue: Animal waste runoff causing water body eutrophication
regulations.recommendation: Implement manure management plans. Install vegetative buffers around animal housing areas.
regulations.regulatory_body: EPA — Clean Water Act CAFO Rule

regulations.issue: Improper disposal of medical and biohazardous waste
regulations.recommendation: Use licensed medical waste disposal services. Segregate sharps, infectious, and chemical waste.

regulations.issue: Improper disposal of pharmaceutical and chemical waste
regulations.recommendation: Enroll in DEA take-back program. Use licensed pharmaceutical waste handlers.

regulations.issue: Excessive plastic bag and single-use packaging distribution
regulations.recommendation: Offer reusable bag alternatives. Partner with packaging manufacturer for take-back programs.

regulations.issue: High energy consumption contributing to carbon emissions
regulations.recommendation: Switch to LED lighting. Upgrade to Energy Star-rated refrigeration units. Install smart thermostats.

regulations.issue: Electronic waste disposal violating e-waste regulations
regulations.recommendation: Use certified e-waste recyclers (R2/e-Stewards certified). Track asset disposition records.

regulations.issue: High PUE data center operations wasting energy and water
regulations.recommendation: Optimize cooling systems. Target PUE below 1.5. Consider renewable energy sourcing.

regulations.issue: Vehicle fleet emissions exceeding EPA emission standards
regulations.recommendation: Transition to EVs or CNG vehicles. Conduct annual fleet emission checks.
regulations.regulation_title: Clean Air Act — Mobile Source Emission
